meaning: 埃德蒙顿[加拿大西南部城市](阿尔伯达省省会)
examples: The victim had been on the bus since Edmonton.
It took us six hours to drive to Edmonton but we made it!
From Fairbanks, Alaska, he flew to Edmonton, Canada and then on toward New York.
It is as far north of Edmonton as Edmonton is north of Salt Lake City, Utah.
An Edmonton retail jeweler will showcase a 10-carat fancy light purplish pink diamond from April 13-17.
